name: gitpagedocs
description: CLI that generates out/ 100% identical to GitHub Pages (Next.js static export). npx gitpagedocs --serve to generate and view.

scripts.build: node scripts/gitpagedocs-init.mjs --build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const o='out-init/gitpagedocs'; const g='gitpagedocs'; if(fs.existsSync(g)) fs.rmSync(g,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(o,g,{recursive:true}); try{fs.existsSync('out')&&fs.rmSync('out',{recursive:true})}catch(e){}" && next build
scripts.build:prebuilt: node scripts/gitpagedocs-init.mjs --build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const o='out-init/gitpagedocs'; const g='gitpagedocs'; if(fs.existsSync(g)) fs.rmSync(g,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(o,g,{recursive:true})" && next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('prebuilt')) fs.rmSync('prebuilt',{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('out','prebuilt',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('prebuilt/.nojekyll','')"
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if(process.platform==='win32'){console.warn('Skipping build:prebuilt on Windows (EBUSY). Use GitHub Actions to publish with prebuilt.');process.exit(0)}require('child_process').execSync('npm run build:prebuilt',{stdio:'inherit'})"

author: Vidigal-code
